title: Social Security Disability Insurance - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF THOMAS, COON, NEWTON & FROST SOCIAL SECURITY DISABILITY BENEFITS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Represents adults and children seeking social security disability benefits (SSI and SSD). Services include assisting individuals by preparing initial applications and function reports, handling appeals, representation at hearings, and representation in federal court appeals if necessary. 820 SW 2nd Avenue Suite 200 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted; anyone seeking social security disability benefits Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 228-5222 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with information about Medicare, Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI), Supplemental Security Income (SSI), retirement benefits, survivors insurance, fraud reporting, and Social Security cards. Website provides addresses, hours of operation, and directions to local Social Security offices and other agencies that may be able to help with Social Security issues. A national call center is available for those who need information beyond what is available online and through automated telephone services. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 4am-4pm (800) 772-1213 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THOMAS, COON, NEWTON & FROST SOCIAL SECURITY DISABILITY BENEFITS
